seo_title: MIT Professor Dimitris Bertsimas on AI and Its Impact on Real-World…
meta_description: MIT Professor Dimitris Bertsimas discusses how his work in operations research has helped drive real-world improvements, including the use of artificial…
body_html:
Bertsimas has tried to improve the human condition through his work in operations research.

Key Applications of Operations Research

  • Enhancing international business logistics
  • Freeding up hospital beds
  • Helping farmers

Use of Artificial Intelligence in Scholarly Projects and MIT Open Learning Efforts

Project Ai Application
MIT Open Learning efforts Artificial intelligence as a tool

Robust Optimization and Its Influence on Operations Research

Bertsimas has made significant contributions to the field of robust optimization, which is a highly influential approach in operations research.

Describing the concept of "robust optimization," Bertsimas discussed its applications and ongoing studies.

He also highlighted his current efforts to add AI to his research.

Read time: 8 minutes

source.title: On algorithms, life, and learning
source.summary: Operations research expert Dimitris Bertsimas delivered the annual Killian Lecture, providing a look at the past and future of his work.
